P. 2/23/2006-ftt 3flft] •Hcrl'l d PPPT?, PPPT? -nRlcI 4948 GI/2015 (I) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [Part II—Sec. 3(i)] ftiqui : JTT MTTcT IldM?, 3WIHI<U|, HPT II„ IT? 3, TTST (ii) # THTTPE 1693 (31), HTfns 3 3TTTPR, 2007 54KT VPHflTH ^1 «fl 3tU dcMWId, HI.^T.f^. -HlfUi* 69(31) HlfPsI 6 QRTfT, 2012 3ttT HT.^T.f?!. 645 (31) HTtrtsT 15 f^TFT^T. 2014 JjgRT WltftTH £l h|| MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th November, 2015 G.S.R. 907(E). —In exercise of the powers conferred by section 29A of the Cost and Works Accountants Act, 1959 (23 of 1959), read with sub-rule (1) of rule 8 of Cost and Works Accountants (Procedures of Meetings of Quality Review Board, and Terms and Conditions of Service and allowances of the Chairperson and members of the Board) Rules, 2006, the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Corporate Affairs, number G.S.R. 1693 (E) dated the 3rd October, 2007, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), dated the 3rd October, 2007, namely:- 2. In the said notification, for serial number (3) and the entry relating thereto, the following serial number and entry shall be substituted, namely:- "(3) Ms. Y Ray Chaudhuri, Member". Principal Director of Commercial Audit and ex-officio Member, Audit Board-II, Kolkata, Old Nizam Palace, 1st Floor, Kolkata - 700020. 3. This notification shall take effect from the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. (F. No. 2/23/2006 -PI] MANOJ KUMAR, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub section^) vide number G.S.R. 1693(E), dated the 3rd October, 2007 and subsequently amended vide number G.S.R. 69(E), dated the 6,h February, 2012, and G.S.R. 645(E), dated the 15,h September, 2014. t Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
